description: MVP-karakas besplatnogo scenariya dlya dvoih igrokov v dating-formate.
product_goal: Pomoch pare bystro pochat znakomstvo, pochuvstvovat vibe drug druga i poluchit temy dlya prodolzheniya obshcheniya.

scene_flow.title: Start of Route
scene_flow.purpose: Dat korotkiy kontekst i zapustit marshrut bez dolgogo onboarding.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Snyat startovoe napryazhenie, dat pervyy ochen legkiy otvet i myagko perevesti igroka k signalu o vibe i vkuse.
question_templates: Kakoy vibe dlya takogo vechera tebe blizhe?
S chem tebe legche nachat takoe priklyuchenie?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Igroki ponyali mehaniku i gotovy pereyti k bolee soderzhatelnomu vyboru napravleniya.

scene_flow.title: Pick a Direction
scene_flow.purpose: Pochuvstvovat temp i stil predpochteniy na starte marshruta.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Perevesti znakomstvo ot obschego vibe k tempu, stilyu dvizheniya i pervomu meaningful sovpadeniyu ili razlichiyu.
question_templates: Kuda tebya tyanet v takoy istorii?
Chto iz etogo kazhetsya samym priyatnym startom?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Poluchit signal o stile marshruta i vybrat vetku sovpadenie ili kompromiss.

scene_flow.title: Shared Stop
scene_flow.purpose: Razvernut sovpadenie v bolee konkretnuyu scenu i dat eshche paru legkih signalov o lichnosti.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Prevratit sovpadenie vo vovlekayuschuyu sovmestnuyu scenu i pokazat kak chelovek vedet sebya v prijatnoy situacii.
question_templates: Chto ty by sdelal zdes pervym?
Kakaya detal sdelala by eto mesto priyatnee?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Pokazat povedenie vnutri sceny i podgotovit bolee lichnuyu pauzu bez poteri legkosti.

scene_flow.title: Third Option
scene_flow.purpose: Myagko oboyti razlichie cherez neytralnyy ili neozydannyy tretij variant.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Sdelat razlichie igrovym, a ne problemnym, i pokazat gibkost cheloveka v novoy ili kompromissnoy situacii.
question_templates: Vy vybrali raznye napravleniya. Chto iz etogo tretiego varianta tebe bolee simpaticno?
Chto moglo by sdelat etu ostanovku tvoey?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Sohranit tempo marshruta i dobavit signal o stile reagirovaniya na kompromiss.

scene_flow.title: Pause and Notice
scene_flow.purpose: Sdelat marshrut chut bolee lichnym, ne uhodya v tyazheluyu refleksiyu.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Zamedlit marshrut, smyagchit kontakt i perevesti fokus na teplo, komfort i lichnye detali.
question_templates: V takoy moment tebe bolshe nravitsya govorit ili prosto byt ryadom?
Kakaya melkaya veshch zdes mogla by tebya ocharovat?
Chto by ty zdes zametil pervym?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Sformirovat oshchushchenie chelovechnosti i podgotovit myagkiy perehod k lichnomu interesu.

scene_flow.title: Closer Signal
scene_flow.purpose: Vyvesti paru na uroven teplogo uznavaniya i sobrat temy dlya prodolzheniya razgovora.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Akkuratno perevesti kontakt ot komforta k interesu i podsvetit chto mozhet tseplyat v cheloveke bez nelovkosti.
question_templates: Chto v cheloveke delaet takoy marshrut osobenno prijatnym?
Kakoy znak vnimaniya zdes zapomnilsya by tebe dolshe vsego?
O chem tebe bylo by interesno pogovorit posle etoy tochki?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Sobrat nablyudeniya dlya finalnogo summary i ostavit oshchushchenie lichnogo interesa.

scene_flow.title: Route End
scene_flow.purpose: Zavershit marshrut, sborkoy nabljudeniy i sohranit most v realnoe obshchenie.
scene_flow.psychological_goal: Zakryt marshrut s oshchushcheniem zavershennosti i pomoch pare estestvenno pereyti v realnoe prodolzhenie obshcheniya.
question_templates: Chto iz etogo marshruta ty by zabralsya v realnuyu vstrechu?
Kakuyu sleduyushchuyu temu ty by s radostyu prodolzhil uzhe v chate ili pri vstreche?
scene_flow.transition_goal: Ne otkryvat novuyu temu, a vyvesti paru v vneshniy razgovor i summary.
